channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya and France push for UN reforms and fair representation for Africa
item.description: President William Ruto of Kenya and French President Emmanuel Macron have jointly called for sweeping reforms at the United Nations to make the organisation more democratic, inclusive and fit for toda...

item.title: Orlando Pirates’ Consistency Puts Them on Track for Premiership Glory
item.description: Orlando Pirates have emerged as strong contenders for the Betway Premiership, potentially completing a domestic treble for the first time since the 2011/12 season. Central to their success is the stra...

item.title: David Byrne’s ‘American Utopia’ Concert Film to Screen in Cinemas for One Night in 4K
item.description: The concert film 'American Utopia', directed by Spike Lee and featuring David Byrne, will be returning to cinemas for a single night on 5th August in 4K. The production captures Byrne performing a sel...

item.title: Police investigate fatal collisions near Bela-Bela involving minister’s vehicle
item.description: Police have opened a culpable homicide investigation after a tragic collision on the N1 near Bela-Bela, Limpopo, involving Health Minister Dr Aaron Motsoaledi’s official vehicle. The incident claimed ...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates as Ceasefire Talks Stall and Global Energy Shock Worsens
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the U.S.-Israeli coalition and Iran continues to escalate, with President Trump describing the current ceasefire as 'on life support' after Iran rejected the latest U.S. p...

item.title: Dela Rosa refuses ICC surrender resolution, commits to pursuing legal options
item.description: Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa has firmly rejected the resolution by the International Criminal Court (ICC) calling for his surrender, asserting that he will fully utilize all available legal remedie...

item.title: Bato dela Rosa declines to surrender to ICC despite Senate minority appeal
item.description: Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa on May 13, 2026, publicly refused the request of the Senate minority bloc to surrender voluntarily to the International Criminal Court (ICC) following the issuance of a...

item.title: Nigeria projects $11.6 billion debt service in 2026, Tinubu highlights economic challenges
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don yan say Naija go spend about $11.6 billion on debt servicing for 2026, wey be almost half of the country's projected revenue. Him tok this one for Africa/France summit wey ha...

item.title: B.C. government promotes AI development while addressing safety and energy challenges
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby addressed a crowd at Vancouver's Web Summit, expressing cautious optimism about artificial intelligence (AI) despite its risks. He highlighted both the potential and...

item.title: Ghanaian striker Sowah yet to join Simba U-20 training after disciplinary reinstatement
item.description: Ghanaian striker Jonathan Sowah has not yet returned to training with Simba SC despite the club reinstating him under strict conditions. Earlier this year, Sowah was suspended while Simba were in Dodo...

item.title: BINI talks about their future goals following international success
item.description: Following their historic global breakthrough, Filipino girl group BINI opened up about their next big dreams and aspirations. The group emphasized that their goals have grown even bigger after achievi...

item.title: Federal Government Emphasises Master Plan Before Canberra Stadium Upgrades
item.description: The federal government has signalled that there will be no immediate funding for a new Canberra Stadium, emphasising the importance of completing a master plan for the Australian Institute of Sport pr...

item.title: PAGASA warns of high heat index in nearly 50 areas this Wednesday
item.description: According to PAGASA, almost 50 areas in the Philippines are expected to experience heat index levels categorized as dangerous on Wednesday. Residents are advised to take necessary precautions, especia...

item.title: Temple wall collapse in Maharashtra results in six deaths and fourteen injuries
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Maharashtra where a temple wall collapsed, leading to the death of six devotees and injuring fourteen others. The incident reportedly took place during a religious gather...

item.title: CCM Plans to Boost Party Income Through Large-Scale Investments
item.description: Zanzibar — CCM National Vice-Chairman and Zanzibar President, Dr Hussein Mwinyi, has called on his party to focus on high-value investments that can generate significant income. Speaking during his to...

item.title: McIlroy reflects on LIV Golf’s funding loss and future uncertainty
item.description: Rory McIlroy has publicly commented on the recent announcement that the Public Investment Fund (PIF) will cease funding the LIV Golf series at the end of the season, with LIV chairman Yasir Al-Rumayya...

item.title: Financial and Infrastructure Challenges Strain UKZN, Affecting Students and Staff
item.description: The University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) is facing significant financial and infrastructural challenges that have brought the institution to the brink of bankruptcy. The Vice-Chancellor, Prof Nana Poku,...

item.title: Dangote Confirms Plan for Large Oil Refinery in Tanga to Serve East Africa
item.description: Niaje! Nigerian industrialist Aliko Dangote ana mpango mkubwa sana wa kujenga refinery ya mafuta yenye uwezo wa 650,000 barrels kwa siku katika Port ya Tanga, Tanzania. Hii refinery itakuwa mfano sawa...

item.title: Georgia GOP Candidate Receives Death Threat Ahead of Bomb Scare at Campaign Event
item.description: Brad Raffensperger, the Republican candidate for governor of Georgia and current Secretary of State, received a serious death threat on Monday, a day before a bomb scare at one of his campaign events....

item.title: Political and Media Responses to Jim Chalmers’ 2026 Federal Budget
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers unveiled his fifth federal budget, which has sparked a wide range of reactions from political commentators and the media. The budget includes key reforms to negative gearing, ca...
